mapper.select: select id, selector, hashed_token, email, member_id, expires_at, used, ip_address, user_agent, created_at, used_at from shop_email_verification where selector = #{selector}
mapper.insert: insert into shop_email_verification (selector, hashed_token, email, member_id, expires_at, used, ip_address, user_agent, created_at) values (#{selector}, #{hashedToken}, #{email}, #{memberId}, #{expiresAt}, #{used}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: update shop_email_verification set used = 1, used_at = now() where member_id = #{memberId} and used = 0
update shop_email_verification set used = 1, used_at = now() where email = #{email} and used = 0
mapper.delete: delete from shop_email_verification where expires_at < now()
